pi_items.source: Task description and task.json metadata. Jenkins BuildDiscarder daysToKeep parameter verified via web search: https://docs.cloudbees.com/docs/cloudbees-ci-kb/latest/best-practices/deleting-old-builds-best-strategy-for-cleanup-and-disk-space-management

Task description states 'maximum of 5 builds'. Jenkins BuildDiscarder numToKeep parameter verified via web search: https://docs.cloudbees.com/docs/cloudbees-ci-kb/latest/best-practices/deleting-old-builds-best-strategy-for-cleanup-and-disk-space-management

setup_task.sh lines 42-54 generate reports/test-report.xml and reports/coverage-report.html. Patterns are valid Ant-style wildcards matching hudson.tasks.ArtifactArchiver format: https://github.com/jenkinsci/jenkins/blob/master/core/src/main/resources/hudson/tasks/ArtifactArchiver/help-artifacts.html

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Jenkins freestyle job named 'Integration-Tests' with two key requirements: (1) Enable 'Discard old builds' to keep builds for 14 days with a maximum of 5 builds retained, using Jenkins' BuildDiscarder with daysToKeep=14 and numToKeep=5 parameters; (2) Add an Artifact Archiver post-build action to archive files matching patterns 'reports/*.xml' and 'reports/*.html'. The setup uses synthetic data consisting of dummy XML and HTML report files generated by a shell script within the job. All metadata values are accurate and correspond to the actual task configuration and the Jenkins artifact archiving conventions (Ant-style wildcard patterns with comma-separated format).
